refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
Structured performance requirements database with traceability links
Version-controlled management system for baseline and calibration updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording database, and version-controlled update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and database schema
Update management dependent on accurate traceability
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability and update management cohesively.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity or diffusion risk increases in later levels.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time worksite mission context data necessary for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other NGHE subsystems for execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and synchronization with external management tools

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this functionality is core to NGHE software; low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation.
Vehicle module is primarily physical control; low containment and high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control; poor fit for performance requirement management.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety policies; unrelated to performance requirement derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update history requirements.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if other unrelated functions are added
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability, satisfying the high safety criticality and documentation constraints.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation in NGHE Solution
Potential interface complexity with Telemetry and Network Link requires careful management
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting clear ownership and minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability matrices and update history logs within NGHE Solution software.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM is clear and aligns with system architecture and stakeholder needs.

recommended_revisions: Plan for modular sub-division within NGHE Solution if complexity grows
Define detailed interface protocols for Telemetry and Network Link to ensure data integrity

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear traceability. No further decomposition is needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; recommended revisions are for future monitoring.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can support integrated software functions without excessive complexity
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if update management is not robust
Interface robustness with Telemetry and Network Link
evidence_needed: Traceability documentation and update history logs
Interface test results for Telemetry and Network Link
